_comment: Copy this file to tests/daq/regression_config.json (gitignored) and fill in the real values. Confirm each device_id/address and the DO->DI loopback wiring matches your bench before running the hardware suite. The 'generated' section is written by the harness on first run and reused on later runs.
_data_scope_comment: Must match the refname the shared workbook template binds its channels to.
